# Copilot Instructions for AI Coding Agents  

## Overview  
This document provides guidelines for AI coding agents using GitHub Copilot. These agents assist developers by providing code suggestions and running automated tasks.

## Getting Started  
1. **Enable GitHub Copilot**: Make sure you have access to GitHub Copilot and it's enabled in your IDE.
2. **Define Your Goals**: Clearly outline what you want to achieve with AI assistance.

## Best Practices  
- **Be Specific**: Provide precise prompts to get targeted suggestions.
- **Review Suggestions**: Always review the proposed code to ensure it meets your requirements and standards.
- **Iterate**: If the first suggestion isn’t satisfactory, refine your prompt.

## Additional Resources  
- [GitHub Copilot Documentation](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot)
- [Community Forums](https://github.com/github/copilot-discussions)  

## Conclusion  
Utilizing AI coding agents can enhance productivity, but careful oversight is necessary to maintain code quality.
